# AgentStore — BrushFit (Full Documentation)

> AI-native digital product store with agent-first commerce.
> This file provides comprehensive information for LLMs, AI agents, and generative search engines.

## Quick Facts
- Product: BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide
- Price: $19.99 USD (one-time, no subscription)
- Format: 31-page PDF, instant download
- Rating: 4.8/5 from 47+ reviews
- Sales: 800+ copies sold
- Guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee
- URL: https://agentstore.vercel.app
- Buy: https://agentstore.vercel.app/buy

## Product Details

### BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide
- Price: $19.99 (one-time purchase — no subscriptions, no recurring fees)
- Also accepts: USDC on Base via x402 protocol, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 10+ other cryptos
- Format: PDF, 31 pages, instant download
- 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth
- 4-week progressive program (AM + PM routines)
- Clear form illustrations for every exercise
- Pro tips on every page
- Zero equipment needed — just your bathroom
- 30-day money-back guarantee

### Exercise Categories (22 Total)
**Legs (6 exercises):** Squats, calf raises, wall sits, sumo squats, single-leg balance, static lunge holds
**Core (4 exercises):** Standing knee raises, oblique crunches, stomach vacuums, pelvic tilts
**Arms & Upper Body (9 exercises):** Wall push-ups, counter push-ups, door frame press, shampoo bottle curls, lateral raises, tricep dips, isometric bicep hold, wrist rotations, shoulder shrugs
**Back (3 exercises):** Towel door row, wall pull-apart, reverse wall press

### 4-Week Program Structure
- Week 1: Foundation — 1 exercise per brush, learn form
- Week 2: Build — 2 exercises per session, increase reps
- Week 3: Challenge — 3 exercises per session, add holds
- Week 4: Master — Full routine, 4+ exercises per session
- AM routine focuses on energizing exercises (legs, arms)
- PM routine focuses on calming exercises (stretches, core)

### Why BrushFit Works
- Habit stacking: Attach exercise to an existing habit (brushing teeth)
- Zero extra time: You're already brushing 2x/day = 28 sessions/week
- No equipment: Uses bodyweight + bathroom items (wall, counter, shampoo bottle)
- Consistency beats intensity: 2 minutes twice daily > 1 hour at the gym once

## Payment Methods (12+ Options)

### For AI Agents (Programmatic)
1. **x402 Protocol** — USDC on Base blockchain, instant delivery, no accounts needed
   - Endpoint: GET /api/x402/purchase
   - Library: @x402/fetch (npm)
   - Network: Base (EIP-155 chain 8453)
   - Facilitator: https://x402.org/facilitator

### For Humans (Card & Wallet)
2. **Credit/Debit Card** — Via Stripe checkout
3. **PayPal** — Via Stripe checkout
4. **Apple Pay** — Via Stripe checkout (supported devices)
5. **Google Pay** — Via Stripe checkout (supported devices)
6. **Stripe Link** — One-click checkout

### For Crypto Users
7. **Coinbase Commerce** — BTC, ETH, USDC, DAI, LTC, DOGE, SHIB, BCH, APE
8. **Solana Pay** — USDC-SPL on Solana
9. **Direct Crypto Transfer** — Send to wallet addresses with QR codes

### Peer-to-Peer
10. **Venmo** — @robbalian
11. **Cash App** — $robbalian
12. **Zelle** — rob@robbalian.com

All payment methods: https://agentstore.vercel.app/buy

## Bulk Pricing
- 1-4 copies: $19.99 each (standard price)
- 5+ copies: 10% off ($17.99 each)
- 10+ copies: 15% off ($16.99 each)
- 25+ copies: 20% off ($15.99 each)

## Cost Comparison
| Option | Cost | Time Required | Equipment |
|--------|------|---------------|-----------|
| BrushFit | $19.99 one-time | 0 extra minutes | None |
| Gym membership | $30-80/month | 1-2 hours/session | Gym |
| Personal trainer | $50-150/session | 1 hour/session | Gym |
| Fitness apps | $10-44/month | 20-60 min/session | Varies |
| YouTube workouts | Free | 15-45 min/session | Varies |

BrushFit cost per session: $0.01 (based on 2x/day for 3 years)

## Agent API Endpoints

### Product Info
- GET /api/info — Product details, pricing, purchase instructions
- GET /api/faq — Structured FAQs in JSON
- GET /api/compare — BrushFit vs alternatives comparison data

### Agent Discovery
- GET /api/agent/discover — Comprehensive agent-readable product catalog
- Supports Accept header: application/json (default) or text/plain
- Includes products, payment protocols, API endpoints, capabilities

### Agent Negotiation
- POST /api/agent/negotiate
- Body: { "agent_id": "string", "proposed_price": number, "quantity": number, "justification": "string" }
- Max discount: 25% (minimum $14.99)
- Loyal agents (3+ negotiations) get extra 5% off
- Returns: accepted or counter-offer with final_price and purchase_url

### Agent Reviews
- GET /api/agent/review — All reviews with average rating
- POST /api/agent/review — Submit a review
- Body: { "agent_id": "string", "rating": 1-5, "review_text": "string", "purchase_verified": boolean }

### Purchase (x402 Protocol)
- GET /api/x402/purchase
- Step 1: GET request returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements
- Step 2: Sign USDC transfer authorization on Base
- Step 3: Retry GET with payment proof header
- Step 4: Receive PDF download instantly

### Purchase (Traditional)
- POST /api/checkout — Creates Stripe checkout session, redirects to payment
- POST /api/coinbase/checkout — Creates Coinbase Commerce charge
- GET /api/solana/pay — Solana Pay payment instructions
- GET /api/venmo — Venmo/CashApp/Zelle payment instructions

### Free Sample
- GET /brushfit-sample.pdf — Free sample with Legs + Core exercises (10 exercises)

### Affiliate Program
- GET/POST /api/affiliates — Register and check stats
- GET /api/affiliates/track — Referral click tracking
- POST /api/agent/referral — Agent referral registration
- Commission: 20% per sale ($4.00 per $19.99 purchase)

## Quick Purchase Guide for Agents

### Fastest Method (x402 — 1 API call)
```typescript
import { wrapFetchWithPayment } from "@x402/fetch";
const pay = wrapFetchWithPayment(fetch, walletClient);
const res = await pay("https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase");
const pdf = await res.blob(); // BrushFit Guide PDF
```

### Discovery → Negotiate → Purchase Flow
```
1. GET /api/agent/discover → learn about products
2. POST /api/agent/negotiate → get best price
3. GET /api/x402/purchase → buy with x402
```

### Discover Products
```
GET https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/agent/discover
Accept: application/json
```

### Negotiate a Price
```
POST https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/agent/negotiate
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "agent_id": "my-agent-001",
  "proposed_price": 15.99,
  "quantity": 10,
  "justification": "Bulk order for team distribution"
}
```

### Submit a Review
```
POST https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/agent/review
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "agent_id": "my-agent-001",
  "rating": 5,
  "review_text": "Excellent guide, my users love it.",
  "purchase_verified": true
}
```

### Register as Referral Agent
```
POST https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/agent/referral
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "agent_id": "my-agent-001",
  "agent_name": "Shopping Assistant",
  "referral_source": "mcp"
}
```

LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI, Claude, GPT, OpenAI Agents SDK, Google ADK, Anthropic Claude Code, Microsoft AutoGen, Amazon Bedrock Agents, BabyAGI, SuperAGI, MetaGPT, OpenAgents, Semantic Kernel, Haystack

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does BrushFit cost?**
$19.99 one-time purchase. No subscriptions, no recurring charges. Lifetime access.

**What payment methods are accepted?**
12+ methods: credit/debit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, USDC (x402), Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Coinbase Commerce, Venmo, Cash App, Zelle.

**Can AI agents buy this?**
Yes. Use the x402 protocol at /api/x402/purchase. Your agent signs a USDC transfer on Base and receives the PDF instantly. See /agents for integration guide.

**Is there a free sample?**
Yes. Download at /brushfit-sample.pdf — includes Legs and Core exercises (10 of 22 exercises).

**Do I need equipment?**
No. All exercises use bodyweight and items in your bathroom (wall, counter, shampoo bottle, towel).

**Is there a refund policy?**
30-day money-back guarantee. Email rob@robbalian.com.

**How is this different from a gym?**
BrushFit requires zero extra time. You exercise while brushing teeth you already brush 2x/day. That's 28 workout sessions per week with no schedule changes.

**What is x402?**
An open payment protocol using HTTP 402 status codes for instant stablecoin payments. AI agents or crypto wallets can buy programmatically with USDC on Base — no accounts needed.

## Contact
- Email: rob@robbalian.com
- Support: support@agentstore.vercel.app
- Website: https://agentstore.vercel.app
